title: Contract Review
shortDesc: AI-powered contract analysis that identifies risks, clauses, and opportunities in seconds.
description: Our AI engine reviews contracts against thousands of legal precedents and common pitfalls. It highlights risky clauses, missing provisions, and negotiation opportunities so your team can move faster with confidence.

title: Legal Research
shortDesc: Instant access to relevant case law, statutes, and regulations tailored to your query.
description: Stop spending hours in law libraries. CriterIA's legal research tool uses NLP to surface the most relevant precedents, statutes, and commentary from millions of documents. Get citation-ready summaries in minutes.

title: Document Automation
shortDesc: Generate polished legal documents from smart templates in minutes.
description: Eliminate repetitive drafting with intelligent document assembly. Answer a guided questionnaire and our engine populates clauses, definitions, and schedules based on your inputs and jurisdiction-specific requirements.
features: Smart template library (NDAs, MSAs, SOWs, etc.)

title: Due Diligence
shortDesc: Accelerate M&A and investment due diligence with AI-driven document review.
description: Our platform ingests thousands of documents and automatically categorizes them, flags red-flag clauses, and generates a structured diligence report. Reduce review time by up to 80% while improving accuracy.

title: Compliance Monitoring
shortDesc: Real-time regulatory monitoring and compliance alerts tailored to your industry.
description: Stay ahead of regulatory changes with automated monitoring across thousands of government and regulatory sources. Receive tailored alerts and impact assessments so your business never misses a compliance deadline.

title: Litigation Analytics
shortDesc: Data-driven insights into judge rulings, opposing counsel, and case outcomes.
description: Leverage historical case data to predict litigation outcomes and craft winning strategies. Analyze judge rulings, opposing counsel track records, and venue-specific trends with interactive dashboards.

title: AI Legal Assistant
shortDesc: Your 24/7 AI co-counsel for drafting, research, and quick legal answers.
description: A conversational AI trained on legal corpora that helps you draft clauses, answer procedural questions, and summarize case law. Think of it as having a junior associate available around the clock.

title: E-Discovery
shortDesc: End-to-end electronic discovery with AI-powered tagging and privilege review.
description: Process terabytes of email, chat logs, and documents with defensible AI workflows. Automated privilege screening, predictive coding, and near-duplicate detection reduce review costs by up to 70%.
